name: Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter with hot cooked noodles in a large bowl, then add the eggs and stir until blended in.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Pour the mixture into a 9 x 13 inch baking pan and bake at 350°F for one hour.
4. Serve with roasted vegetables or other dishes. This is a forgiving recipe. For a lighter version of kugel, beat the whites first; however, I never do this. This is the traditional way of serving what's considered unhealthy but tastes delicious. These days, I only make it for special occasions, such as when little Sara comes to dinner.
